instruction: Add only free primary-source collectors and enforce precision-bound eligibility as code.
sources: IETF Datatracker payment draft revision changes
GitHub releases.atom and tags.atom for MPP, MPP specs and PaymentAuth repositories
Merged GitHub pull requests in the configured reporting window
Official-blog RSS allowlist for Tempo, Coinbase x402/CDP, Cloudflare, Circle and paymentauth.org
eligibility: Require specific MPP, x402, PaymentAuth, HTTP 402, draft or named-repository evidence
Reject bare 402 and generic agent-payment matches
Require canonical URL, publication date, excerpt, entity match and confidence
Keep inventory, implementation activity, news and unverified community separate
Deduplicate before scoring and do not triple-count cross-source duplicates
stop_after: Return source-specific fixtures, precision risks and proposed acceptance thresholds before implementing all sources.
